name: Grilled Portabella Chevre and Arugula Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 thick slices crusty rustic style bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix olive oil with crushed garlic until smooth.
2. Brush mushrooms and red onion with olive oil mixture.
3. Grill on both sides until done, about 5 minutes per side. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Grill bread on both sides.
5. Spread one piece of bread with mayo and the other with chevre.
6. Fill with mushroom slices, onion slices, and arugula.
Serves 2.
